name: Cryoport, Inc.
summary: Cryoport, Inc. is a life sciences company providing temperature-controlled supply chain solutions, primarily serving the cell and gene therapy markets. The company offers cold chain logistics services and related technologies to support the transport of biologic materials. Cryoport previously operated CRYOPDP, a logistics subsidiary, which it divested and formed a strategic partnership with DHL as part of its ongoing business restructuring.

products.name: Temperature-Controlled Supply Chain Solutions
products.description: Cold chain logistics services for the transport of biologic and cell and gene therapy materials.

products.name: CRYOPDP
products.description: A logistics subsidiary that was divested; now subject to a strategic partnership with DHL.

partnerships.description: Strategic partnership formed following the divestiture of CRYOPDP business unit.
